changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Feeding page (Page 8) to the Virology notebook template
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Feeding page into the template INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Feeding', 'Log culture feeding and maintenance activities. Record feeding schedule and reagents used from inventory with full traceability. Document feeding date, time, schedule (e.g., Daily, Every 2 days), reagents used, volume, and observations (e.g., cell confluence, media color, contamination check).', 'Feeding - Culture maintenance and feeding schedule tracking', 8, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 8 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Feeding page from template DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE title = 'Feeding' AND page_order = 8 AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true );

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Feeding page (Page 8) to existing Virology notebook instances that don't have it
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Feeding page for each Virology notebook instance that doesn't have page 8 INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Feeding', 'Log culture feeding and maintenance activities. Record feeding schedule and reagents used from inventory with full traceability. Document feeding date, time, schedule (e.g., Daily, Every 2 days), reagents used, volume, and observations (e.g., cell confluence, media color, contamination check).', 'Feeding - Culture maintenance and feeding schedule tracking', 8, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title LIKE '%Virology%' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 8 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Feeding pages added by this changeset DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE title = 'Feeding' AND page_order = 8 AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Virology%' AND is_template = false );
